entries.title: Exposition on Psalm 119 on psalms 119:78
entries.excerpt: He then goes on as follows: "Let the proud be confounded, for they have unrighteously practised iniquity against me: but I will be occupied in Your commandments" [Psalm 119:78]. Behold, what he says, the meditation of the law of God, or rather, his meditation the law of God.
